---
title: "HW2 - mtcars Dashboard"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: simplex
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(tibble)

df <- mtcars %>%
  rownames_to_column("car") %>%
  mutate(
    gear = factor(gear),
    carb = factor(carb),
    cyl  = factor(cyl)
  )
```





Sidebar {.sidebar}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

Prepare a dashboard using the **mtcars** data. You need to write the code to replicate the plots.

1. Send the link to the code in a GitHub repository  
2. Publish the dashboard using GitHub Pages  
3. The README should include the dashboard link.

**NOTE:** You may vary titles and colors.

Column
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### THREE-GEAR CARS ARE DOMINANT

```{r}
gear_counts <- df %>% count(gear)

ggplot(gear_counts, aes(x = n, y = gear)) +
  geom_col(fill = "grey80", width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), color = "blue", size = 6, hjust = 1.1) +
  labs(
    title = "Count of Cars per GEAR",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Gear",
    caption = "Source: mtcars data"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

Column
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### FEW CARS have SIX or more CARBURATORS

```{r}
carb_counts <- df %>% count(carb)

ggplot(carb_counts, aes(x = carb, y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "yellow", width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -0.4, size = 4, color = "darkgreen") +
  labs(
    title = "Count of Cars per CARB",
    x = "CARB",
    y = NULL,
    caption = "Source: mtcars data"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 1),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  ylim(0, max(carb_counts$n) + 2)
```

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Only 5-gear cars utilize the 6 and 8 carburetor setups.

```{r}
g <- df %>%
  count(gear, carb, cyl) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / nrow(df) * 100)

ggplot(g, aes(x = cyl, y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "yellow", width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", pct)), vjust = -0.2, size = 3) +
  facet_grid(gear ~ carb) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Cylinder Counts by Carburetors and Gears",
    x = "cylinders",
    y = "Count",
    caption = "Source: mtcars data"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 1)
  )
```
